message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "Each party agrees to hold in confidence all Confidential Information received from the other party. \"Confidential Information\" means any non-public information disclosed by either party, whether orally, in writing, or electronically, that is designated as confidential or that reasonably should be understood to be confidential given the nature of the information and the circumstances of disclosure.",
      "clause_name": "Confidentiality",
      "clause_type": "confidentiality",
      "summary": "Obligates both parties to keep shared confidential information private.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Protects sensitive information from unauthorized disclosure.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure all employees are trained on confidentiality obligations.",
        "Regularly review and update confidentiality practices."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other party from and against any claims, damages, and losses arising out of a breach of this Agreement by the indemnifying party.",
      "clause_name": "Indemnification",
      "clause_type": "indemnity",
      "summary": "Provides for indemnification between the parties for breaches of the agreement.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Potential financial liability for breaches could be significant.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Consider obtaining insurance to cover potential indemnity claims.",
        "Review indemnity provisions regularly to ensure adequacy."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of this Agreement. The total liability of either party shall not exceed fifty thousand dollars ($50,000).",
      "clause_name": "Limitation of Liability",
      "clause_type": "liability",
      "summary": "Limits the liability of both parties to direct damages up to $50,000.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Limits financial exposure but may not cover all potential damages.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Evaluate whether the liability cap is sufficient for your business.",
        "Consider negotiating higher liability limits if necessary."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fifteen (15) days' written notice to the other party. Upon termination, each party shall return or destroy all Confidential Information received from the other party.",
      "clause_name": "Termination",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "Allows either party to terminate the agreement with notice.",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "impact": "Provides flexibility to exit the agreement but requires notice.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure proper procedures are in place for termination.",
        "Maintain records of all confidential information for compliance."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Both parties shall comply with applicable data protection laws with respect to any personal data exchanged under this Agreement. Each party shall implement reasonable security measures to protect such data.",
      "clause_name": "Data Protection",
      "clause_type": "privacy",
      "summary": "Mandates compliance with data protection laws and security measures.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Failure to comply could result in legal penalties.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Conduct regular audits of data protection practices.",
        "Stay updated on changes in data protection laws."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of San Francisco, California.",
      "clause_name": "Governing Law and Dispute Resolution",
      "clause_type": "dispute resolution",
      "summary": "Establishes California law as governing and specifies dispute resolution location.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Determines legal jurisdiction for any disputes.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Consider the implications of California law on your business.",
        "Prepare for potential disputes in the specified jurisdiction."
      ],
      "confidence": 0.8
    }
  ]
}
